projectSummary: Country Garden Danga Bay offers newer waterfront condos within the mature Danga Bay district with stable family rental demand.
rentalAnalysis: Rental demand score 4/5 within Danga Bay district.
Average rent ~RM 2,050; furnished 2-bed leases in 4–7 weeks.
Price against same-tower recent rents, not district-wide averages.
tenantProfile: Prefers furnished units with responsive management near waterfront amenities.
